title: Author a Realm Definition
description:
## Realm as Code

Keycloak realms can be imported from JSON (realm export/import), which is how you version realm config and bootstrap environments reproducibly.

**Your task:** write a minimal realm definition at **`/root/realm.json`** that:
1. names the realm **`falcon`** (`realm` field)
2. is **enabled** (`enabled: true`)
3. requires SSL for external requests (`sslRequired: "external"`)

> 💡 It just needs to be a valid realm JSON object with those fields — it won't be imported here.

hints.title: Minimal realm JSON
hints.body: A realm export is a JSON object keyed by realm settings; the realm name and enabled flag are the essentials.

validation.description: Checks for a valid realm JSON named falcon that is enabled.

commands.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/root/realm.json')); print('ok' if d.get('realm')=='falcon' and d.get('enabled') is True else 'no')"
